landing.title: Cosmic Intelligence For Crypto and Gold Time-Series Forecasting
landing.description: Explore a production-grade trading dashboard powered by real market data, realtime stream updates, and machine learning forecasts. Sign in to unlock the full dashboard with live candles, prediction confidence bands, and advanced market signals.
highlights: Lightweight charting with MA, RSI, MACD, and forecast overlays
Realtime WebSocket candle stream with robust reconnect handling
Hugging Face Chronos forecasting pipeline integrated with sentiment
landing.protectedNotice: Protected route is active: dashboard access requires a valid Cognito JWT session.

errors.loadSymbolsFailed: Unable to load symbols. Check JWT token and backend availability.
errors.networkInterrupted: Network connection was interrupted while loading chart data. Retrying...
errors.authInvalid: Authentication token is invalid or expired. Please sign in again.
errors.routeNotFound: Requested API route was not found. Please verify backend deployment.
errors.backendUnavailable: Backend is temporarily unavailable. Please retry in a moment.
errors.chartLoadFailed: Unable to load chart data. Verify backend, token, and S3 parquet data.
errors.chartSwitchRetry: Network unstable while switching timeframe. Retrying chart load...
errors.cachedChartLoaded: Loaded cached chart data. Live refresh will retry automatically.
errors.olderCandlesFailed: Unable to load older candles. Please retry after a moment.
errors.predictionBusy: Prediction service is busy. Please retry in a few seconds.
errors.predictionTransient: Temporary network interruption while predicting. Retrying usually succeeds.
errors.predictionVerifyBackend: Prediction request failed. Please verify backend /predict availability.
errors.fetchLatestCandlesFailed: Unable to fetch latest market candles for prediction.
errors.minCandlesRequired: Prediction requires at least 20 real candles. Please wait for latest sync.

predictionPanel.title: Prediction
predictionPanel.subtitle: Horizon controls use hours/days and map to chart timeframe steps.
predictionPanel.confidencePlaceholder: Run a prediction to view confidence interval.
predictionPanel.sentimentPlaceholder: Sentiment is computed automatically from latest market candles.
predictionPanel.externalSentimentPlaceholder: External sentiment is fetched from live macro/news/social feeds per prediction.

predictionPipeline.initializingDescription: Preparing data and connecting to the model.

sync_market_data.title: Sync latest candles
sync_market_data.description: Fetch the latest chart data to avoid predicting on a stale snapshot.

fetch_external_context.title: Gather market context
fetch_external_context.description: Prepare sentiment and off-price context in the backend.

prepare_payload.title: Normalize input data
prepare_payload.description: Combine candles and horizon into a unified payload for the model.

send_request.title: Send prediction request
send_request.description: Send the payload to the /predict endpoint.

run_inference.title: Model is inferring
run_inference.description: Computing forecast array, confidence bands, and volatility.

render_output.title: Render output to chart
render_output.description: Draw the prediction line, forecast range, and update the panel.

tradingChart.emptyChartData: Chart data is empty. Select a symbol and ensure API access token is valid.
tradingChart.invalidChartData: Chart data was received but contains invalid timestamp or OHLCV values. Refresh history and verify backend candle formatting.

legend.clickHint: Click chart to pin OHLC tooltip, Esc to close

tooltip.closeHint: Press Esc to close the info panel.

authModal.signInDescription: Sign in with Cognito email/password to unlock protected routes.
authModal.signUpDescription: Create a Cognito account with your email and a strong password.
authModal.confirmDescription: Enter the verification code sent to your email.

errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must have at least {{count}} characters.

success.verificationSent: Verification code sent. Confirm account to continue.
success.codeResent: A new verification code has been sent.
